html: I’ve got qwen3.6 27b running on my media server atm. Given that I built on top of what I already had, it didn’t cost me nearly that amount. I’ve been running 2x 5060 ti 16gbs, and when using text only and nvfp4, I can run the model with 200k context length and roughly 50-60 toks. It’s very good, and costed me about $800 after buying the gpus from microcenter.
